name: Python + Node + GitHub CLI
description: Polyglot workload for Python and Node projects with shared auth state and package caches.

authMounts.name: agent-home
authMounts.description: Persist GitHub CLI auth and shared language-tool state.

cacheMounts.name: npm-cache
cacheMounts.description: Persist npm package downloads between sessions.

secrets.name: github-token
secrets.description: Optional token for non-interactive GitHub auth flows.
